context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 features from iteration 8 are working correctly: 1) Login page has no test account info, 2) Bank accounts show balance and have delete button with balance check, 3) Payments have edit/delete with bank account required, 4) Teacher edit form has user info section, 5) Student course dialog filters teachers by branch, 6) Group form has class dropdown (5-8) and student search, 7) Students page shows summary stats, 8) Year-end button on dashboard with confirmation dialog. Backend API endpoints all working correctly.
